summary: ThreeDScene: cube with 8 vertices + 12 edges drawn as wireframe. Red space-diagonal axis (1,1,1)/√3 marked. ValueTracker phi_tr rotates the cube about the diagonal via Rodrigues formula + always_redraw through 2π in 3 phases (120°, 240°, 360°); fixed-frame panel highlights when θ is a multiple of 120° — the 3-fold symmetry.
